summary: Mission v10.3 - Glow Violet, Mémoire Chat & Récap Réservation - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified: (1) Like button with glow violet boxShadow #D91CD2 (rgba(217, 28, 210, 0.8) 0px 0px 20px), (2) Heart filled with #D91CD2 after click, (3) Counter changes from 0 to 1, (4) localStorage keys af_chat_client/afroboost_identity defined at ChatWidget.js L42-44, (5) Header icons gap 16px verified on desktop and mobile, (6) Récapitulatif réservation premium component implemented at ChatWidget.js L327-430.
